principles: Function Over Decoration: Every pixel must serve a purpose.
Data Density: High information density with clear hierarchy.
Visual Precision: Perfect alignment, consistent spacing (4px grid base).
Tactile Feedback: Interactive elements must feel responsive and solid.
hall_of_shame: No gradients on data visualization (use solid colors for clarity).
No rounded corners > 8px on internal data components (keep it technical).
Avoid 'cute' illustrations; use schematic or photographic imagery.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-900 focus-visible:ring-offset-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-red-500 text-white hover:bg-red-600 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-900 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.grid_cell: w-12 h-12 text-center border border-slate-200 focus:border-slate-900 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-900 rounded-sm

cards.default: rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-950 shadow-sm
cards.metric: p-6 flex flex-col gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white hover:border-slate-300 transition-colors

grid.container: relative w-full overflow-auto rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-8
grid.cell: aspect-square border border-slate-200 bg-white flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-mono hover:bg-slate-50 cursor-pointer transition-colors relative

layout_structure.grid_visualizer_container: col-span-12 lg:col-span-8 xl:col-span-9 h-[600px] flex flex-col

stacking_rules.visual_representation: Heatmap intensity (Darker = Higher) or Badge Counter

simulation.visual_step_highlight: Highlight current cell and target cell with connecting line

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for data visualization; use solid colors for clarity.
Ensure all interactive elements have a focus state for accessibility.
Use 'Chivo' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all code, identifiers (SKUs, Coordinates), and tabular numbers.
Maintain the 'Swiss Industrial' aesthetic: generous whitespace, high contrast borders, minimal decoration.
All interactive elements must include 'data-testid' attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INTEGRATION: Add 'Warehouse Layout' to the sidebar navigation in `AppShell.jsx`.
2. PAGE CREATION: Create a new page `WarehouseLayoutPage.jsx` at `/app/frontend/src/pages/`.
3. ROUTING: Add the route `/layout-optimization` to the main router.
4. STATE MANAGEMENT: Use `useState` or `useReducer` for the grid state (cells, stacks, simulation steps).
- `LayoutControls`: Sidebar for grid size, strategy selection, and simulation controls.
- `StackInspector`: A drawer or modal to view/edit containers in a selected cell.
- `SimulationMetrics`: Cards showing cost, moves, and time.
6. ALGORITHM: Implement a basic 'Greedy' strategy interface in frontend logic (mockable) for now.
7. VISUALS: Use the defined colors (Slate/Orange/Blue) to represent empty, occupied, and target states.
8. TESTING: Ensure all new components have `data-testid` for the test agent.
